title: viburnum opulus f. sterile
intro: Viburnum opulus f. sterile, also known as the Snowball Tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. It is characterized by its sterile flowers, which are white and compact, resembling a snowball, and its red berries are sterile, which means they do not produce viable seeds. The medicinal properties of Viburnum opulus f. sterile include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Viburnum opulus f. sterile include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
